value: Thank you for reaching out. I understand your concern about our delivery drivers waiting at the door during unpacking—that's not the experience we want you to have. Our drivers are instructed to complete the delivery and depart promptly, so if you experienced something different, we'd like to address it. Could you let me know when this delivery took place and which driver or delivery slot it was? That way we can look into what happened and ensure it doesn't occur again.
